description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a complex roofline featuring multiple gables and dormers. The exterior combines light blue-gray siding with sections of red brick, and the roof is finished in dark gray shingles. The property is surrounded by a low fence and includes a driveway leading to a two-car garage, as well as a front yard with manicured grass and several mature trees. The backyard features a swimming pool, a patio area with outdoor furniture, and additional landscaping. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some large picture windows and smaller dormer windows on the upper floor. The main entryway is accentuated by a covered porch with columns and a paved walkway.
description: A spacious two-story suburban house with a gabled roof, brick and siding exterior, garage, and landscaped yard with a pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage, driveway, and manicured front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the house, the pool area, and the backyard landscaping.
description_view_2: Side view with a clear look at the backyard pool, patio furniture, and side windows.
description_view_3: Angled view showing both the garage/driveway and the backyard pool, with trees partially obscuring the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: mixed symmetrical and asymmetrical rows with dormer and picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, paved walkway, and a prominent front door
